evals.prompt: Create a settings page using Mindtickle UI with a MainNav sidebar, PageHeader, and a form for name and email fields.
evals.expected_output: A React component tree using MainNav, PageHeader, FieldGroup, Field, semantic tokens, and @mindtickle installs.
expectations: Uses MainNav for the sidebar instead of custom navigation markup
Uses PageHeader for the page title and actions
Uses FieldGroup and Field for form layout
Uses semantic tokens and variants instead of raw Tailwind colors
Installs components with the @mindtickle registry prefix

evals.prompt: Create a dialog for editing a profile using Mindtickle UI in a Base UI project. Include trigger, title, fields, and save/cancel actions.
evals.expected_output: A Dialog composition using render-based trigger composition, DialogTitle, and Field helpers.
expectations: Uses render instead of asChild for the Dialog trigger
Uses Field and Input components for form controls
Uses Button variants instead of manual styling

evals.prompt: Build a filter toolbar with a Select, ToggleGroup, and destructive reset action using Mindtickle UI.
evals.expected_output: A toolbar that uses Base UI Select items, correct ToggleGroup control patterns, and semantic destructive styling.
expectations: Uses Select items instead of Radix placeholder-only composition
Uses ToggleGroup instead of manually toggled buttons
Uses destructive or destructive-muted tokens appropriately
